title: Future of Marketing Briefing: The case for and against the death of the big brand ad
description: Marketing has a new favorite argument: is it still smarter to talk to a million people at once, or to find the thousand people they already trust?

title: Michaels says Google-powered AI assistant doubles conversion rate of traditional search
description: Michaels has lifted the curtain on how its new Google Gemini-powered AI assistant has performed so far.

title: Tractor Supply sputters in Q2, lowers outlook
description: The retailer is having a tough year so far as its pet business falters, its customers face soaring fuel prices and Amazon encroaches on its territory.

title: Michaels launches AI shopping assistant
description: The retailer is positioning the Ask Mike tool as a way shoppers can move beyond keyword filtering and receive personalized recommendations.

title: H&M to lay off 76 NYC-based corporate employees
description: The retailer regularly reviews its operations to "stay flexible, efficient, and fast-moving," the company told Retail Dive.

title: Bath & Body Works rolls out store updates
description: The retailer is enhancing locations in the U.S. and Canada with simplified navigation, clearer signage and streamlined layouts to make product discovery more intuitive.

title: How Sazo uses agentic AI for cross-border commerce infrastructure
description:
Agentic artificial intelligence (AI)-powered cross-border commerce company Sazo wants consumers to be able to buy from other countries as easily as they shop at home, according to chief financial officer Gavin Jung. Sazo began by offering cross-border commerce from South Korea to Japan in early 2024. It then added Japan to Korea in June 2025. […]
The post How Sazo uses agentic AI for cross-border commerce infrastructure appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Ecommerce Trends: 3 AI-related problems retailers are trying solve
description:
As artificial intelligence (AI)-powered solutions bring new opportunities to some of the largest online retailers in the world, AI-related problems for retailers have created their own markets for help. Some of these issues stem from adoption by third-party actors with bad intentions — but others can result from unsuccessful deployments or poor strategy. But which […]
The post Ecommerce Trends: 3 AI-related problems retailers are trying solve appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Publishers Can Turn to Ecommerce
description:
AI search can force media companies to pivot and recognize the value they already possess.
The post Publishers Can Turn to Ecommerce appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: Ugg teams with buzzy pop band Muna for back-to-school campaign
description: The effort also includes a college ambassador program and purpose-driven partnerships celebrating art and self-expression.

title: Scrunch vs Ahrefs: AI visibility tracking comparison
description: Scrunch and Ahrefs Brand Radar both track brand visibility in AI answers, but they solve different problems. Scrunch is purpose-built for AEO: it monitors AI citations, audits AI crawlability, and actively optimizes how AI bots experience your site. Ahrefs Brand Radar is an add-on to the broader Ahrefs SEO platform, built for teams that want AI visibility alongside traditional search data, backlinks, and web mentions in one place.

title: Marketplace Briefing: How Whatnot’s AI-powered recommendation system gives it a competitive edge
description: Whatnot believes its recommendation systems — which now refresh in just minutes — are what set the company apart from competitors. Whatnot chief product officer Tom Verrilli spoke with Modern Retail about what makes recommendations uniquely challenging in live commerce.

title: [AINews] Black Forest Labs FLUX 3 - Multimodal Flow Models that beat Seedance 2.0, Gemini Omni and Grok Imagine, and FLUX-mimic video-action robotics model
description: A HUGE win for BFL!

title: Kroger’s new CEO, a Walmart veteran, is focused on speed and execution
description: Foran joined Kroger in February after serving as CEO of Air New Zealand since 2020. Before that, he was president and CEO of Walmart U.S. for about six years.

title: What to know about new proposed tariffs on Canadian goods
description: A fresh round of Trump tariffs on Canadian goods were announced this week that target industries like dairy, alcohol and automobiles.
